raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "The Assembly Public Safety Committee unanimously passed two measures to stop the dangerous release of Sexually Violent Predators (SVPs).",
    "SB 380 aims to create a transitional housing program on state properties for SVPs.",
    "State Hospital officials have allowed their vendor, Liberty Healthcare, to target communities with little oversight.",
    "SB 380 helps ensure SVPs are housed in state-run transitional facilities rather than residential neighborhoods.",
    "SB 379 aims to prevent the state from secretly placing SVPs in unsuspecting communities without regard for public safety.",
    "SB 379 mandates that the Department of State Hospitals (DSH) ensure that Liberty Healthcare considers public safety in placement decisions.",
    "SB 379 requires DSH to approve all placements before Liberty Healthcare can sign leases for placement locations.",
    "The SAFE Act will require transparency in the SVP placement process.",
    "The SAFE Act holds state officials accountable for their decisions regarding SVP placements."
  ]
}
```
